title: Spring Hike — Ravenswood Park
description: A beautiful 4-mile loop through coastal forest. We'll stop midway for coffee and a chance to talk. No experience needed — just bring water and good shoes.

title: Morning Fishing — Salem Willows
description: Early morning fishing off the pier. Gear available for those who need it. We'll grab breakfast after. This is as relaxed as it gets.

title: Kayak Launch — Marblehead Harbor
description: A guided paddle around the harbor. Kayaks provided. We'll go at a relaxed pace with plenty of stops. You don't need to know how to kayak — just be willing to try.
